key_drivers: DXY firmed to 98.216 on the day, creating a modest headwind for metals, equities, and euro exposure.
The latest accessible EIA crude line still shows a draw, while Middle East supply risk remains part of the oil backdrop.
Credit spreads remain tighter and SOX remains constructive, but the daily MOVE rebound keeps index conviction selective.
Policy divergence remains the clearest FX theme because the RBA is hawkish after the March hike and the BoJ still signals further normalization if its outlook is realized.
